ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Quote Sent"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Quote_Status__c, "Sent"))), AND(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Quote Under Review"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Quote_Status__c, "Viewed by Customer"))), AND(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Quote Accepted"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Quote_Status__c, "Accepted"))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change the Opportunity Stage unless the Quote Status matches.
